description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the node:7.9.0 Docker image and globally installs vsce with npm in a before_script. Add a build job (default stage) that runs only on tag pipelines, sets VER to the version from package.json using `export VER=`node -e "console.log(require('./package.json').version);"``, echoes $VER, runs `npm install --unsafe-perm`, `npm run compile`, changes into the client directory, packages the VS Code extension with `vsce package`, moves the resulting *.vsix file to the project root, and defines an artifact named KickAssemblerExtension-$CI_COMMIT_REF_NAME containing all *.vsix, *.md, and License.txt files. Cache the client/node_modules/ and server/node_modules/ directories, and expose a variable TEST equal to $VER.
